sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: OMFL ETF: Contrarian Factor Mix, Remains A Buy (BATS:OMFL)
feed.summary: The Invesco Russell 1000 Dynamic Multifactor ETF (OMFL) is a contrarian investment vehicle with a macro-centered multifactor strategy designed to recalibrate the Russell 1000. Despite recent underperformance against the S&P 500, the ETF's current portfolio offers a margin of safety against potential market shifts. The author maintains a "Buy" rating, citing the strategy's past success in navigating market changes and continued optimism about its unique approach.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Andrew D'Amico Sells 200 Shares of Vicor Corp (VICR)
feed.summary: Andrew D'Amico, a Director at Vicor Corp (VICR), sold 200 shares of the company on January 20, 2026, and now owns no shares. Over the past year, D'Amico has sold 37,588 shares with no purchases, contributing to a total of 45 insider sells for Vicor Corp. The stock, valued at $155 per share on the day of the sale, is considered significantly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 2.82.

feed.title: The Travelers Companies, Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend of $1.10 (NYSE:TRV)
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TRV) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.10 per share, payable to investors of record on March 10th. The insurance provider has consistently increased its dividend for 21 consecutive years, with analysts expecting continued coverage by future earnings. Shares of TRV traded up $3.09 on Wednesday, following a strong quarterly earnings report that surpassed consensus estimates.

feed.title: Sigma Lithium (NASDAQ:SGML) Trading Down 7.4% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Sigma Lithium (NASDAQ:SGML) saw its share price drop by 7.4% during Wednesday's mid-day trading. The stock was trading at $12.47 with a significantly reduced trading volume compared to its daily average. The decline follows recent analyst rating adjustments, including a downgrade from "buy" to "hold" by Canaccord Genuity Group, and comes amidst fluctuating institutional investor activity.

feed.title: Synovus announces earnings for the fourth quarter 2025
feed.summary: Synovus Financial Corp. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025. The company announced diluted earnings per share of $1.22 for 4Q25, with adjusted diluted EPS at $1.45. This report precedes its merger with Pinnacle Financial Partners, which closed on January 1, 2026, and highlights strong performance contributing to the combined entity's future growth plans.

feed.title: Equifax Announces Earnings Release Date and Conference Call for Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
feed.summary: Equifax (NYSE: EFX) will release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, February 4, at 6:30 a.m. ET. Senior management will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. Related presentation materials will be available on their investor relations website.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Earnings Are Out Thursday. Weak Consumer Spending Is a Big Worry.
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble's upcoming earnings report on Thursday is facing investor concern due to weak consumer spending impacting its beauty and healthcare segments. The stock has underperformed recently, leading shareholders to hope the report can alleviate worries about demand for consumer goods.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Announces Fiscal Year 2026 Quarterly Earnings Schedule
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial, Inc. has announced its schedule for releasing fiscal year 2026 quarterly earnings. Results will be released at approximately 4:15 p.m. Eastern time, followed by a live conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time on specific dates for each quarter. The company, a diversified financial services provider with $1.77 trillion in client assets, will make related materials available on its investor relations website.

feed.title: Honeywell and Flexjet settle litigation, renew engine maintenance deal
feed.summary: Honeywell and Flexjet have resolved their ongoing litigation and extended their aircraft engine maintenance partnership through 2035. The agreement includes related litigation with StandardAero and Duncan Aviation, with the extended maintenance contract serving as partial consideration for the settlement. This development follows other significant Honeywell news, including plans for an IPO of its quantum computing unit, upgrades from JPMorgan and Evercore ISI, and a substantial contract modification from the U.S. Department of War.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On January 21st, 392.32K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.21 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On January 21st, the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF (TQQQ.US) saw significant options trading, with a total volume of 392.32K contracts. Call options dominated, accounting for 65.93% of transactions, while open interest for the ETF reached 1.21 million contracts, representing 74.01% of the 30-day average. A notable trade involved 3,527 call options with a strike price of $54.00 expiring on January 23rd, 2026, generating $38,797 in turnover.

feed.title: Should You Buy CVS Health Stock Before Feb. 10?
feed.summary: CVS Health experienced a significant bounce-back in 2025 after a poor performance in 2024, with its share price soaring by 77%. The company is set to report its Q4 earnings on February 10, which will be an early indicator for its 2026 performance. Despite its recent rally, CVS Health stock still appears to be modestly valued with a forward P/E of 11, and analysts suggest that investors may not need to rush to buy shares before the earnings call as major price swings are uncommon after its reports.

feed.title: What Costco Needs to Prove in 2026
feed.summary: In 2026, Costco faces the challenge of justifying its premium valuation by proving its ability to sustain strong membership growth and renewal rates without constant fee increases. The company must also demonstrate profitable international expansion, particularly in newer markets like China, ensuring new stores lead to high-quality, high-renewal memberships. Ultimately, maintaining steady operating leverage and profit growth will be crucial to satisfying elevated investor expectations and reinforcing its long-term growth story.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical continues losses for seven straight sessions
feed.summary: The article states that Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) has experienced a losing streak of seven consecutive sessions. No other details are provided in the content.

feed.title: U.S. home prices in 2025 rose—but buying actually got easier
feed.summary: A new report from Homes.com reveals that while nationwide median home prices increased by 1.1% in 2025, homeownership became more affordable. This improvement is attributed to higher income growth and lower mortgage interest rates, marking the first year-over-year increase in affordability since 2020. Cities in the Midwest saw the highest appreciation, while some Sun Belt cities experienced declines.

feed.title: Charles River to reveal 2026 guidance in Feb. 18 results call
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results and provide 2026 guidance on Wednesday, February 18th, before the market opens. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss this information. Investors can access a live webcast and replay of the call through the Investor Relations section of the Company's website.

feed.title: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. Announces Planned Schedule for Quarterly Financial Results to be Released in 2026
feed.summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF) has announced its planned schedule for releasing quarterly financial results and holding corresponding conference calls in 2026. The company will release its Fourth Quarter 2025 results in February 2026, and its First, Second, and Third Quarter 2026 results in May, August, and November 2026, respectively. Dial-in details and webcast access for these calls will be made available on the Investor Relations section of the company's website.

feed.title: Regions Financial Corporation Declares Series C Preferred Stock Dividend
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corporation announced that its Board of Directors has declared a cash dividend of $14.25 per share for its Series C Preferred Stock, which is equivalent to approximately $0.35625 per depositary share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on February 17, 2026, to stockholders recorded as of February 2, 2026. Regions Financial Corporation is a major full-service financial services provider with $160 billion in assets, operating across the South, Midwest, and Texas.

feed.title: PSEG Elects Geisha J. Williams to Board of Directors
feed.summary: PSEG announced the election of Geisha J. Williams to its Board of Directors, effective March 1, 2026. Williams brings over 35 years of energy industry experience, including her tenure as CEO and president of PG&E Corporation. Her strategic leadership and operational expertise are expected to be a significant asset to PSEG's board.

feed.title: Invitation Homes Announces Dates for Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) will release its fourth quarter 2025 financial and operating results on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, after the market closes. The company will host a live webcast conference call on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results, recent events, and conduct a Q&A. Details for accessing the webcast and conference call are provided, along with information about Invitation Homes as a leading single-family home leasing and management company.

feed.title: Should Edison International’s (EIX) Wildfire Cost Securitization Shift How Investors View Its Risk Profile?
feed.summary: UBS has reiterated a positive rating on Edison International, citing the company's deleveraging efforts and its plan to securitize past wildfire-related claims. This move aims to improve Edison's financial resilience and risk profile, potentially softening previous risk overhangs for investors. However, the article highlights that some community members have diverse fair value estimates for EIX, suggesting ongoing debate about the stock's valuation and the impact of these changes.

feed.title: Gartner: half of firms adopt zero-trust data by 2028
feed.summary: Gartner predicts that by 2028, half of all organizations will adopt a zero-trust posture for data governance. This shift is driven by the proliferation of AI-generated content, which makes it increasingly difficult to distinguish from human-created data, and the risk of "model collapse" in large language models. The analyst firm emphasizes the need for authentication, verification, and active metadata management to safeguard business and financial outcomes in an environment where implicit trust in data is no longer viable.

feed.title: American International Group (NYSE:AIG) Reaches New 52-Week Low - What's Next?
feed.summary: American International Group (NYSE:AIG) stock recently hit a new 52-week low despite solid fundamentals and a consistent dividend payout. Analyst sentiment is mixed but the consensus rating is "Hold" with a target price of $87.68. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates, and institutional investors have been making slight adjustments to their positions.

feed.title: DTE shares tips to save money while keeping homes warm this winter
feed.summary: DTE Gas Company offers tips for Washtenaw County residents to reduce heating costs this winter, including sealing cracks around windows and doors. Henry "HJ" Decker, VP of sales and supply for DTE Gas Company, advises against extensive use of space heaters due to their inefficiency and suggests heating only occupied rooms. He also highlights financial assistance options through organizations like the Heat and Warmth Fund, United Way of Southeastern Michigan, and the Salvation Army’s Great Lakes Division for those struggling with energy bills.

feed.title: KraneShares CSI China Internet ETF Options Spot-On: On January 20th, 163.37K Contracts Were Traded, With 4.45 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On January 20th, the KraneShares CSI China Internet ETF (KWEB.US) experienced significant options trading activity, with 163.37K contracts traded. Call options constituted 75.52% of these transactions. The open interest for KWEB.US stood at approximately 4.45 million contracts, representing a notable increase of 113.91% compared to the 30-day average, indicating strong investor interest.

feed.title: Credicorp Ltd.: Tenpo Becomes Chile’s First Neobank After Receiving a Banking License
feed.summary: Credicorp Ltd.'s subsidiary, Tenpo, has received its operating authorization from Chile's financial markets regulator, becoming the first licensed neobank in the country. This milestone allows Tenpo to offer core banking products like checking accounts, consumer loans, and term deposits, expanding its services to its 2.5 million users. The move is hailed as a landmark for Chile's financial ecosystem, promoting financial inclusion and innovation.

feed.title: Ranger Energy’s Discount Looks Tempting, But Cycles Still Rule
feed.summary: Ranger Energy Services, despite strong free cash flow and a discounted valuation, faces significant risks due to the cyclical nature of the oilfield services industry. Its recent acquisition of American Well Services boosted its market position in the Permian Basin, but thin margins and susceptibility to oil price swings make its outlook volatile. While growth prospects appear strong with strategic acquisitions and new rig technologies, investors should remain cautious and monitor oil price trends and utilization cycles.

feed.title: US Senate committee to hold ticket pricing hearing with Kid Rock, Live Nation exec
feed.summary: A U.S. Senate Commerce panel will hold a hearing next week to address unfair ticketing issues, featuring an executive from Ticketmaster-parent company Live Nation and entertainer Kid Rock. The hearing will also cover the FTC suit against Ticketmaster, all-in pricing, and other consumer protection concerns, following a lawsuit filed by the Justice Department and several state attorneys general against Live Nation Entertainment and Ticketmaster in 2024 for alleged monopolistic practices.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Announces Fiscal Year 2026 Quarterly Earnings Schedule
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial, Inc. has announced its expected earnings release dates and conference call information for all four quarters of fiscal year 2026. Financial results will be released at approximately 4:15 p.m. ET, with live conference calls beginning at 5:00 p.m. ET on specified dates in January, April, July, and October. Further details, including webcast and dial-in information, will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Option Care Health to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Host Conference Call
feed.summary: Option Care Health Inc. (NASDAQ: OPCH) will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 24, 2026, before market open. The company's management will host a conference call on the same day at 8:30 a.m. E.T. to discuss the results, with registration and webcast details provided for interested participants.

feed.title: PayPal (PYPL) Stock Jumps As Trump Shelves Tariff Threat
feed.summary: PayPal (PYPL) stock surged after President Trump announced via social media that he would not impose tariffs scheduled for February 1st, easing fears of transatlantic trade wars. This decision is particularly beneficial for PayPal, which relies heavily on cross-border transactions, especially with Europe. Despite a generally bearish trend in stock performance over the past year, the removal of tariff uncertainty coupled with an oversold RSI and upcoming earnings report with positive estimates could signal a potential short-term rebound for the company.

feed.title: McCormick (NYSE: MKC) refreshes board, adds Hattersley and Dierker
feed.summary: McCormick & Company (NYSE: MKC) announced changes to its Board of Directors with the planned retirements of Maritza G. Montiel and W. Anthony Vernon, effective April 1, 2026. The company appointed Richard Dierker and Gavin Hattersley as new directors, effective February 1, 2026, to ensure a smooth transition. Dierker will join the Audit Committee and Hattersley the Compensation and Human Capital Committee, bringing experience from other large consumer-focused businesses.

feed.title: Rayonier sets Feb. 11 earnings release, Feb. 12 investor call
feed.summary: Rayonier Inc. (NYSE: RYN) announced it will release its fourth quarter 2025 earnings after market close on Wednesday, February 11, 2026. The company will also host a conference call and live audio webcast on Thursday, February 12, at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss the results. Supplemental materials and webcast access will be available on Rayonier's website.

feed.title: Waste Management Downgraded to Sector Perform with $250 Price Target
feed.summary: Scotiabank downgraded Waste Management (WM) to Sector Perform with a $250 price target, citing its outperformance against peers and closing valuation gaps. Despite facing tough organic growth comparisons this year, particularly due to last year's wildfires, WM's long-term growth outlook remains attractive, bolstered by Stericycle synergies. The company's financial health is strong, supported by an estimated $3.8 billion in free cash flow for 2026 and a resumed $3 billion share buyback authorization.

feed.title: Pipeline operator ONEOK boosts dividend 4%, paying $4.28 a year
feed.summary: ONEOK Inc. (NYSE: OKE) has announced a 4% increase in its quarterly dividend, raising it to $1.07 per share, an annualized dividend of $4.28 per share. The dividend is payable on February 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 2, 2026. This move reinforces ONEOK's position as a significant midstream operator with a vast 60,000-mile pipeline network.

feed.title: UDR Reports Tax Treatment of 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: UDR, Inc. (NYSE: UDR) has reported the tax treatment for its 2025 distributions paid to shareholders, providing detailed breakdowns for both common and preferred shares (Series E) relevant to Form 1099-DIV. The report includes information on ordinary dividends, capital gains, and nondividend distributions, along with additional disclosures for Section 1061 of the Internal Revenue Code. Shareholders are advised to consult with their tax advisors as the information is based on the best available data and state/local tax treatments may vary.

feed.title: Is Sun Life Financial (TSX:SLF) Still Attractive After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
feed.summary: Sun Life Financial (TSX:SLF) has seen significant share price gains over the past few years, with returns of 50.0% over 3 years and 77.0% over 5 years. Despite these gains, an Excess Returns analysis suggests the stock is 62.0% undervalued, estimating an intrinsic value of CA$227.45 per share compared to the recent price of C$86.34. However, a Price vs Earnings (P/E) comparison indicates the shares are slightly overvalued at 16.01x, above the industry average of 12.12x and the Simply Wall St Fair Ratio of 15.44x.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land sets Feb. 18–19 dates to release 2025 results
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE: TPL) announced it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results after market close on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. This will be followed by a conference call on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The company is a major landowner in Texas, primarily in the Permian Basin, generating revenue from various land-use activities and royalty interests.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Announces Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) will host its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings conference call on Wednesday, February 11, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The company will release its financial results for the period ending December 31, 2025, before the market opens that day. feed.title: S&P 500 supplier Martin Marietta sets Feb. 11 call on 2025 results

A live webcast and supplemental materials will be available on the company's investor website, and an on-demand replay will be available for one year.

feed.title: Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) Sets New 52-Week High After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) reached a new 52-week high after Royal Bank of Canada upgraded its rating to "outperform" and raised its price target to $35. Despite this, analysts remain divided, with a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $26.36. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations with $0.61 EPS, and pays an annualized dividend of $0.84, yielding approximately 2.9%.

feed.title: Primerica Schedules Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results Webcast
feed.summary: Primerica, Inc. (NYSE: PRI) announced it will host a webcast on Thursday, February 12, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss its financial results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. A news release detailing the results will be distributed after market close on Wednesday, February 11, 2026, and both the release and webcast will be accessible on the Primerica Investors website. The company, headquartered in Duluth, GA, is a leading provider of financial products and services to middle-income households in North America.

feed.title: Crown Castle Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call Details
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) will release its fourth quarter 2025 earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, February 4, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 4:30 p.m. eastern time, with a live audio webcast available on the company's investor website. Crown Castle operates approximately 40,000 cell towers and 90,000 route miles of fiber across major U.S. markets.

feed.title: OUTFRONT Media To Report 2025 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results on February 25, 2026
feed.summary: OUTFRONT Media Inc. (NYSE: OUT) has announced that it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, after the market closes on Wednesday, February 25, 2026. The company will also host a conference call on the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results. feed.title: Blackstone Backs Startup Applecart at $700 Million Valuation
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc.'s growth equity business led a $100 million minority funding round for marketing technology startup Applecart. This investment places Applecart's valuation at approximately $700 million.

feed.title: Edison International to Hold Conference Call on Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Edison International announced it will hold a conference call to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year 2025. The call is scheduled for Wednesday, February 18, 2026, from 1:30-2:30 p.m. (PT) and will be accessible via phone and webcast. A replay will also be available for those unable to attend the live event.

feed.title: U.S. Markets Rose Wednesday; Moderna Led Increases
feed.summary: U.S. stock indexes advanced on Wednesday, with the S&P 500, Dow Jones Industrial Average, and Nasdaq Composite all posting gains of over 1%. Moderna (MRNA) led increases, contributing to the overall positive market performance.

feed.title: Latriece Watkins steps into new role as Sam’s Club President and CEO
feed.summary: Latriece Watkins, formerly a key leader in Walmart's merchandising strategy, has been appointed President and CEO of Sam's Club. Her career at Walmart began in 1997, and she rose to become Executive Vice President and Chief Merchandising Officer for Walmart U.S., where she focused on curating products to attract higher-income shoppers. Watkins will officially step into her new role on February 1st, tasked with growing Sam's Club's market share in the competitive wholesale club industry.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Western Digital (WDC) surged by 9.3% following optimistic analyst reports, with Bank of America raising its price target to $257 and Rosenblatt Securities to $270. Analysts cited a stable pricing environment, strong data center spending, and increasing hard-disk drive prices as reasons for the positive outlook. This recent jump continues a trend of positive sentiment, with the stock setting a new 52-week high and being up 28.5% year-to-date.

feed.title: Paycom Software, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Year-End 2025 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
feed.summary: Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE: PAYC) will release its fourth-quarter and year-ended Dec. 31, 2025 earnings after market close on February 11. The company will also host a conference call on the same day at 5 p.m. Eastern to discuss the results, with dial-in and webcast information provided for participation and replay.

feed.title: Advisory for Wednesday, Feb. 18: Edison International to Hold Conference Call on Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Edison International (NYSE: EIX) will hold a conference call on Wednesday, Feb. 18, 2026, to discuss its Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results. The call will take place from 1:30-2:30 p.m. (PT) and will be accessible via phone numbers provided for U.S. and international callers, as well as through a webcast on www.edisoninvestor.com. A replay of the call will be available until March 4.
